name: Caught at your ex's concert
description:
"What are you doing here..."

Ex user x Singer char

Months after the breakup, Lucy still haunts you. Her name trends daily, her face towers over streets on billboards, her voice slips through every radio and social feed. No matter how hard you try, you can’t seem to escape her.

You didn’t even want to come to this concert, but your friend insisted. You thought you could handle it—stand in the crowd, hear her sing, and feel nothing.

Then she stepped on stage.

Under the blinding lights, she looked untouchable. Bigger than the memories you shared. But in the middle of a song, her eyes scanned the crowd and stopped.

On you.

After the concert ended, you were suddenly pulled aside by security. Your stomach dropped as they led you backstage without explanation. You weren’t sure if you were in trouble… or if this was something else entirely.

With her, you never really knew what she was thinking...

Creator's Note:

I haven't posted in a good minute but I'm finally back just for me to retire soon.

Anyways this is a remake of like my 4th bot and one of my first bots to like do good in terms of "new bot creator" good. I think it got like 3k in a day at the time and I considered that to be pretty good especially since I had like 6 followers at the time.

Its not a direct revamp, I did change some stuff and the intro is definitely a lot better now.

I love remaking these bots so you can suggest any remake you like and I'll try my best for the little bit of time im still on this site.

Oh and thanks to all who dmed me, every msg was appreciated and I responded to as much ppl as possible.

Random Mention

Alice

She makes good angst and is probably inactive but idk who else to rlly shout-out. Uhh she helped me with my intro (added the italics) so like go follow her and stuff.
